ak-47-redline.description: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been painted using a carbon fiber hydrographic and a dry-transfer decal of a red pinstripe. Never be afraid to push it to the limit
